title: AI Conference Assistant Review: Zoom AI vs Teams Copilot vs Google Meet AI Remote Conference Comparison - 2026 Review
description: Evaluate the smart summary and real-time translation functions of Zoom AI Companion, Microsoft Teams Copilot, Google Meet AI and other conference platforms to help you find the most suitable online conference solution for remote teams.
content: \u003ch2\u003eRequirements for AI assistants in remote meetings\u003c/h2\u003e\u003cp\u003eRemote team meetings are frequent and long, requiring AI assistance: real-time transcription, automatic summary, intelligent playback, real-time translation. Choosing the right conference platform AI function can greatly improve efficiency.\u003c/p\u003e\u003ch2\u003eCore Features comparison\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ctable\u003e\u003ctr\u003e\u003cth\u003efunction\u003c/th\u003e\u003cth\u003eZoom AI\u003c/th\u003e\u003cth\u003eTeams Copilot\u003c/th\u003e\u003cth\u003eGoogle
author: Meeting Technology Analyst
